reviews.comment:
Todo bien como siempre, pero me sorprendió la app para pagar, no tuve que exhibir ni carnet, ni tarjeta de crédito, ni tarjeta serví club. Con tan solo leer el código QR, todo lo demás, puntos, descuentos, todo automático!!!... Rapidísimo!!!!... Felicitaciones!!!

(Translated by Google)
Everything was fine as always, but I was surprised by the payment app. I didn't have to show my ID, credit card, or Club Service card. Just scan the QR code and everything else—points and discounts—was automatic! Super fast! Congratulations!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzX29ENnBRRRAB
